name: Baked Fudge Pudding-Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake ingredients in a bowl.
2. Stir until well blended.
3. Pour the batter into an 8 by 8 inch pan with the bottom coated with shortening.
4. Mix the topping ingredients separately, ensuring the cocoa is fully dissolved.
5. Carefully pour the topping over the batter.
6. Bake at 350°F for approximately 40 minutes.
7. Serve warm in dessert dishes topped with whipped cream or other desired toppings. Yield: 9 servings
